mapper.select: SELECT other_code FROM pr_house WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE pr_house SET other_code = #{otherCode} WHERE id = #{id}

update.foreach: UPDATE pr_house SET site_type = #{item.siteType}, site_type_old = #{item.siteTypeOld}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{item.id}

mapper.update: UPDATE pr_house SET site_type = NULL, site_type_old = site_type, update_time = NOW() WHERE org_id = #{orgId} AND building_id = #{buildingId} AND del_flag = 0
UPDATE pr_house SET is_charged = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{houseId} AND del_flag = 0
